name: Festive Tater Tot Feast
recipeIngredient: 10 1/2 oz Can Cream Of Celery Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Grease a shallow 2-quart baking dish.
3. In a 10-inch skillet over medium-high heat, cook onions and ground beef until the meat loses its red color.
4. Spoon off any excess fat.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Spread meat mixture in baking dish; cover with undiluted soup.
7. Top with single layer of frozen tater tots.
8. Bake for 45 minutes or until hot and bubbly in the center.
9. Yield: 4-5 servings.
For a hearty addition, stir in a half cup fresh vegetables or drained leftover vegetables when you add the soup. Then top with tater tots and enjoy.
